title: saltugilia grinnellii
intro: Saltugilia grinnellii, also known as Grinnell's gilia, is a species of flowering plant in the phlox family. This perennial plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat digestive issues, inflammation, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Saltugilia grinnellii include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to reduce stress, improve sleep, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Saltugilia grinnellii can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to soothe coughs, calm digestive issues, and promote relaxation.
